allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add robustness and UX improvements to scroller

Replace fixed 2s init delay with element polling, guard against missing
compose button, add 60-iteration scroll safety limit, toggle button text
and color for active/stopped state, handle SPA navigation, and cap the
skip list at 200 entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
